title: Reduce monster defense by 80% to fix combat balance

requirements.text: In the combat engine, reduce all monster defense/armor values by 80%. This applies to base monster stat blocks and any defense contributions from monster prefixes/suffixes. A player with 9 strength should deal meaningful damage (significantly more than 1) to level 1 enemies after this change.

quotes: Reduce monster defense by 80%, I have 9 strength and am hitting level 1 enemies for 1. This is not acceptable.

acceptanceCriteria: Monster defense/armor values in monsters.ts (base templates and prefix/suffix modifiers) are reduced by 80%
The combat engine damage calculation in combatEngine.ts reflects reduced monster defense
A player with 9 strength deals more than 1 damage per hit against a level 1 enemy
No other monster stats (HP, attack, speed) are changed

constraints: Only modify monster defense-related values — do not alter player stats, monster HP, monster attack power, or any other game balance values
nonGoals: Changing XP rewards or loot drop rates
